name: Abyss Sweeper
description: Abyss Sweeper reinvents the classic Minesweeper formula into an intense, infinite descent into the unknown. You are the pilot of a specialized drilling craft, tasked with navigating a treacherous, never-ending grid of rock and volatile energy. Unlike traditional puzzle games, you cannot simply avoid the mines—you must hunt them. Your fuel is constantly draining, and the only way to replenish it is to HARVEST the very mines that threaten to destroy you. How to Play: DIG (Tap): Clear safe tiles to reveal numerical clues. HARVEST (Long Press / Button): Identify a mine location and harvest it to regain critical Fuel. SURVIVE: Watch your Hull
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
